subcodes.first_line: ...O my God, O my God! Verily this plant hath yielded its fruit and standeth upright upon its stalk.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انّ هذا الزّرع قد اخرج شطأه و استوی علی سوقه قد اعجب الزّراع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @petitions to authorities, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
